Interface IVersionedWorkspace

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that manage versions.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("1B256191-B380-11D1-9CE6-0000F8780619")]
public interface IVersionedWorkspace

Properties

DefaultVersion

The Default version.

IVersion DefaultVersion { get; }

Property Value

IVersion

Examples

Sample Snippet

DescendantVersions[string, bool]

A list of descendant versions of a version that can be sorted to optimize reconcile and post.

IEnumVersionInfo DescendantVersions[string Version, bool orderForReconcileAndPost] { get; }

Parameters

Version string
orderForReconcileAndPost bool

Property Value

IEnumVersionInfo

Examples

Sample Snippet

ParentVersions

A list of versions that have child versions.

IEnumVersionInfo ParentVersions { get; }

Property Value

IEnumVersionInfo

Examples

Sample Snippet

RecommendedReconcileOrder

An ordered list of versions that can be used to optimize reconciliation against the default version.

IEnumVersionInfo RecommendedReconcileOrder { get; }

Property Value

IEnumVersionInfo

Examples

Sample Snippet

RecommendedSyncOrder

An ordered list of replicas that need to be synchronized in order to optimize reconciliation against the default version.

IEnumBSTR RecommendedSyncOrder { get; }

Property Value

IEnumBSTR

Examples

Sample Snippet

Versions

All versions the user owns and those which are public or protected.

IEnumVersionInfo Versions { get; }

IEnumVersionInfo

Compress()

Compresses the database by removing states not referenced by a version.
